description: This watch from puma comes in a sleek design. The feature packed dial gives this watch a futursitic appearance perfect for navigating the urban terrain.Case diameter: 30 mmCase thickness: 12 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 2 YearsPlastic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Textured PU straps with a buckle clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with cat logo above the reset bucklesDigital dial showing alarm-feature, chronograph, dual-time-display, perpetual-calendar and timerReset buttons on the sideQuartz movement of time displayAcrylic dial window for better durability Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant upto 50 metres
